items.name: Beast Scroll
items.use: Increases attack damage of allied units within range 500 by 10% for 10 seconds.

items.name: Potion of Recovery
items.use: Replenishes 1000 hit points and 750 mana over 7.5 seconds. Only works out of combat.

items.name: Wand of the Wind
items.use: Cyclone a non-allied unit within range 500 for 5 seconds. For the duration, unit cannot be interacted with.

items.name: Watcher Eye
items.use: Mark a non-allied target within range 800. You have vision of the marked target. Can be dispelled.

items.name: Floating Eye
items.use: Spawn a fragile invisible flying entity that provides vision for 240 seconds. The entity can move, but is very slow.

items.name: Healing Ward
items.use: Drop a healing ward up to range 500, healing all allied units within same range for next 30 seconds.

items.name: Wand of Neutralization
items.use: Sends out a chain of dispelling magic that neutralizes the target unit and up to 5 additional nearby targets, killing summoned units. Bounces focus on units on the same side as the primary target.

items.name: Staff of Teleportation
items.use: Teleports you to the allied target structure after 3 seconds of channeling.

items.name: Manual of Retraining
items.use: Unlearns all hero abilities and returns the skill points.

active.name: Reveal
active.description: Reveal a 2250 area for 10 seconds.

items.name: Chimera Pendant

active.name: Summon Chimera Scout
active.description: Summon a chimera scout. Lasts 450 seconds.

items.comment: Item without an identity and breaks the "rules" of items. Only use case is grabbing "stolen items" in seeds and should be kept simply for that.

active.name: Invisibility
active.description: Invisibility for 3 seconds. For the duration, move through units and damage is reduced by 50% for slightly longer.

passives.name: Runic Mark
passives.description: Basic attacks apply a runic mark on the target for 2.5 seconds, causing them to deal 10 bonus magic damage on-hit consuming the mark.

passives.name: Tidal Fortitude
passives.description: Reduce incoming damage by 1%. Holder also gains 1 extra armor.

passives.name: Crisis Regen
passives.description: When below 50% health, regeneration granted by this item is doubled.

passives.name: Tidal Aura
passives.description: Allied units within range 800 regenerate 5 mana and 5 hit points per second.

active.name: Shadow Walk
active.description: Turn the holder invisible and grant 20% movement speed for 10 seconds over 0.5 seconds. For the duration the holder can move through units. If the invisibility is broken with an attack, inflict additional 50 magic damage. The damage is doubled against buildings

passives.name: Nightsight
passives.description: The holder's vision is not reduced during night time.

active.name: Bond
active.description: Select an allied unit. For the next 7.5 seconds, 15% of the damage both units take is shared as pure damage, and both gain 2 bonus armor.

items.name: Caster Scroll

passives.name: Swift Casting
passives.description: Decrease the cooldown of the owner abilities by 20%.

items.comment: Caster scroll should be associated to mana.

items.name: Enchantress' Fluid

active.name: Abysmal Drink
active.description: Replenishes 500 hit points over 2.75 seconds. For the duration, the user is invulnerable.

items.comment: Changed to hp to follow the caster scroll change

active.name: Energy Blast
active.description: Sends lightning to a non-allied unit within range 650, dealing 195 magic damage to the target and nearby units within range 250. Titan hunters take additional damage equal to 15% of their max health. Builder units take 50% reduced damage. Killing a target refunds 40% of the cooldown.

passives.name: Healing Amplification
passives.description: Upon casting a healing spell, you get healed for an additional 15%.

active.name: Grand Reveal
active.description: Reveal a circular area on the map with radius 3000, granting true sight for 12.5 seconds.

items.name: Tidal Guardian's Grace

passives.name: Shallow Spawns
passives.description: Killing critters spawns shallow spawns for 45 seconds. These fragile mobile units can be used for scouting. You may control up to 1 at a time.

items.comment: Should be considered a pure utility item pre first mini kill and therefore should be easier to invest into and sell later. Also removing Chimaera Pendant from build path.

items.name: Voodoo Doll

active.name: Voodoo Ward
active.description: Create a fragile voodoo ward at the target point within range 1000, lasting 150 seconds. The voodoo ward decreases the armor of all nearby enemy within range 800 by 2 (this effect does not stack).

items.comment: The passive effect of having multiple vodoo ward is extremely boring and simply a book-keeping effect. I think armor reduction is more fitting, since it also synergies with the fact that you may want to use this for ward block.

items.name: Gauntlets of Embers

passives.name: Structure Burn
passives.description: Attacks burn enemy structures for 10 seconds, dealing 5% of the maximum hit point of the structure per second

items.comment:
Should have a simple identity as the wall farmer. Reducing gold costs makes the item easier to access and replace later if the Titan wishes.

yokola95 change: you can bring a wall to half health, and then it will die. The fact that you need to go beyond half health, makes it easy to use to any kind of structure. This makes it a very good farming item, because it basically doubles your damage against walls. On the other hand, the item is very bad for sieging. Note that since the effect is over 10 seconds, it can be countered by repairing. It is only strong for wall outs and for farming (note that if you want to break a lumber base, it will still take you a long time to go through walls).

I would recommend to make this effect maybe dispellable with worker deto.

passives.name: Runic Mark
passives.description: Basic attacks apply a runic mark for 2.5 seconds. Attacking a marked target consumes the mark and deals 25 magic damage (200 magic damage to hunters).

active.name: Transmute
active.description: Instantly transmutes scrap items within the target area and grants gold equal to 100% of their value.

passives.name: Spectral Gold
passives.description: Harvesters yield 1 gold upon dying.

passives.name: Structure Crusher
passives.description: Basic attacks on structures deal 10 + 2×Level bonus pure damage on hit, up to a maximum of 30 bonus damage.

active.name: War Shout
active.description: Increase the damage of all nearby friendly units within range 500 by 20% for 10 seconds.

active.name: Eternal Wards
active.description: Spawn a healing ward at the target location for 30 seconds. The ward recovers lost hit points to all friendly units within range 600.

active.name: Farsight
active.description: Point target. Reveals a circular area on the map within radius (3000 + 30% windsom), granting vision for 12.5 seconds. Also reveals invisible units.

passives.name: True Sight
passives.description: While Farsight is ready, the holder has true sight, seeing invisible units within range 1100.

active.name: Tidal Blast
active.description:
Sends lightning to a non-allied unit within range 750, dealing 200 magic damage to the target and nearby enemies within range 250. Titan hunters take 15% max health bonus damage. Builder units take 50% reduced damage.
For each unit killed this way, create a shallow spawn.

passives.name: Nukemaster
passives.description: Titan's nuke deals 20% bonus damage.

passives.name: Shallow Spawns
passives.description: Killing critter spawns shallow spawns for 45 seconds. These fragile mobile units can be used for scouting. There is no limit on how many shallow spawns you can control.

passives.name: Warlord's Fury
passives.description: Casting a summoning spell grants 15% bonus attack damage for 15 seconds and reduces enemy armor for 3 seconds.

passives.name: Scout's Focus
passives.description: Casting a scouting ability refunds 50% of its mana cost and 50% of its cooldown.

passives.name: Battle Surge
passives.description: Casting a scouting or healing ability heals you for 250% vitality + 10% of your missing health, and grants 35% movement speed for 3.5 seconds.

active.name: Magic Surge
active.description: Regenerate 40% of your mana and health over 3 seconds. For the duration, the user is invulnerable.

passives.name: Unstable Magic
passives.description: Allied units within range 800 regenerate 8 bonus mana and hit points per second.

passives.name: Tidal Fortitude
passives.description: Damage taken is reduced by 2%. The holder also gains 4 bonus armor.

passives.name: Crisis Regen
passives.description: When below 50% health, regeneration granted by this item is doubled.

active.name: Realmshift
active.description: Turn ethereal for up to 10 seconds, broken once you cast a spell. While ethereal, incoming healing is increased by 20%.

passives.name: Spell Armor
passives.description: Spellcasts heal you for for additional 25% + 10% max mana.

passives.name: Swift Casting
passives.description: Decrease the cooldown of the owner abilities by 20%

active.name: Call of Valor
active.description: Select a target allied unit within range 1000. For the next 10 seconds the two units share 25% of the damage they take as pure damage, and both gain 5 bonus armor.

passives.name: Scout's Resolve
passives.description: Casting a scouting ability refunds 50% of its mana cost and 25% of its cooldown.

passives.name: Aegis Surge
passives.description: Casting a scouting or healing ability heals you for 200% vitality hit points and grants 10% movement speed for 2.5 seconds.

passives.name: Swift Casting
passives.description: Decrease the cooldown of the owner abilities by 20%

passives.name: Spell Master
passives.description: Every spell cast increases

active.name: Enchanted Wards
active.description: Place a healing ward without consuming this item. The ward lasts 30 seconds, healing all friendly units within range 600.

active.name: Magic Immunity
active.description: The user becomes invulnerable to magic damage for 6 seconds.

passives.name: Tidal Fortitude
passives.description: Reduce incoming damage by 1%. Holder also gains 1 extra armor.

passives.name: Runic Wrath
passives.description: Attacks deal bonus magic damage equal to 30% windsom + 2% max mana to structures. Spell casts grant an additional 3% windsom and 1% max mana ratio for 5 seconds.

active.name: Voodoo Wards
active.description: Create a fragile voodoo ward at the target point within range 1000, lasting 150 seconds. The voodoo ward decreases the armor of all nearby enemy within range 800 by 4 (this effect does not stack).

passives.name: Corrosive Attack
passives.description: Attack on an enemy unit apply a debuff that decrease the armor by 1 for 8 seconds. The effect stacks.

passives.name: Structure Crusher
passives.description: Basic attack on structures deal 10 + 2x Level bonus damage on hit, up to a maximum of 30 bonus damage.

items.name: Mistlord's Cape

active.name: Shadow Walk
active.description: Turn the holder invisible and grant 20% movement speed for 10 seconds over 0.5 seconds. For the duration the holder can move through units. If the invisibility is broken with an attack, inflict additional 150 magic damage. The damage is doubled against buildings and hunters.

passives.name: Nightsight
passives.description: The holder's vision is not reduced during night time.

items.comment: Reworked item to be an utility item instead of being a good for all items with defensive, offensive, and utility stats.

items.name: Molten Blade

active.name: Transmute
active.description: Instantly transmutes scrap items within the target area and grant gold equal to 100% of their value.

passives.name: Fiery Touch
passives.description: Attacks burn enemy structures for 10 seconds, dealing 5% of the maximum hit point of the structure per second + 40 damage per second.

passives.name: Spectral Fire
passives.description: Killing an enemy causes a fiery explosion dealing 49 damage to nearby enemies and structures. Harvesters yield 2 gold upon dying.

items.comment:
Should this even be an attack speed item? Make it way cheaper and remove attack speed to have a clearer identity (less Spear-like)?

yokola95: make it a combination of two farming item: spectral blade and guantlets. Good against worker block, and you can also get gold feed from it by transmuting items.

items.name: Poseidon's Trident

active.name: War Shout
active.description: Increase the damage of all nearby friendly units within range 500 by 20% for 10 seconds.

passives.name: Titan Crusher
passives.description: Basic attacks on structures deal 10 + (5 × hero level) bonus damage on hit, up to a maximum of 50 bonus damage.

items.comment: Move speed should not be on this item, weird build path + regaining its identity as a high burst option.

items.name: Spear of Fervor

passives.name: Fervor
passives.description: Basic attacks grant bonus attack speed for 2.5 seconds, stacking up to 6 times for up to 30% bonus attack speed.

passives.name: Vampirism
passives.description: Basic attacks heal you for 30+ 15% of the damage dealt.

items.comment: Pure on hit item. Trying to create more distinct identities between the pure damage TIER-3 items.

active.name: Consume Ankh
active.description: Consume the ankh, gaining the bonuses granted by this item.

passives.name: Reincarnation
passives.description: Upon death, respawn with 2500 hit points, activating Superiority.

items.name: Berserker's Gem
items.comment: Classic attack speed stat stick Tier 2 item that is usable for several builds.

items.name: Vampiric Mask

passives.name: Vampirism
passives.description: Basic attacks heal you for 30.

items.comment: We are lacking a pure "Lifesteal" TIER-2 item.

items.name: Cyclone Staff

active.name: Cyclone
active.description: Cyclone a non-allied unit within range 500 for 5 seconds. For the duration, unit cannot be interacted with.

items.comment: Like eternal ward, the possibility to have a cyclone effect without losing a consumable. It also allows to do double wand by using this item and a wand of the wind after. The item needs to be relatively cheap because it has no stats.

active.name: Gust of Wind
active.description: Increase movement speed by 25% for 3 seconds.

items.name: Ancient Staff of the Wind

active.name: Wind
active.description: It can select either a friendly unit or a enemy unit. If it selects an enemy unit, it casts cyclone, disabling the enemy unit for 5 seconds. If it selects a friendly unit, it provides 25% movement speed for 3 seconds, and also removes collision to enemy units for the duration (you still collide with enemy buildings).

items.comment: This item is an alternative to stormrider cloak as an upgrade to webbed feet. The active component is strong against worker-block if cast on self, and the active component can be used to setup a nuke on enemy rewaller (which is still countered by detoing one of your workers from worker block :) ). While the active part is strong, the item is balanced on the fact that it provides no stats as a tier 3 item.
